channel.title: Slices on Fernando L. Couto
channel.description: Recent content in Slices on Fernando L. Couto

item.title: Basic about Go Slices
item.author: fernandolcouto@gmail.com (Fernando L. Couto)
item.description: An Introduction to Slices This discussion approaches ARRAY, SLICE, Slice internals, Growing slices and A possible “gotcha” from the source available in: Go Slices: usage and internals ARRAY First of all to understand SLICEit’s necessary understand ARRAYin Go, since the slice type is an abstraction that comes from Go’s array type. Thus the ARRAY [5]int has the type [5]int which represents an ARRAYof ten integers elements, where the array’s size is fixed and its length is part of its type.
